title: HGL DINOSAUR SMALL HEAD T-REX TUB
features: Detailed dinosaur head that also acts as a storage tub.
T-rex dinosaur head with 12 assorted dinosaur figures, easy to carry thanks to its closure by a screw lid with a handle, this head can also be placed on a shelf to decorate a child's room
Package Dimensions: 18.0 L x 16.0 H x 9.0 W (centimeters)
description: Product Description Detailed dinosaur head that also acts as a storage tub. This impressive bust looks like a fantastic display piece, showing off a detailed t-rex baring its teeth. Flip it over and pop off the lid to find a stash of twelve small dinosaur figures inside. Safety Warning Small parts, chocking hazzard.
